steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
At the intersection, both equations have the same $y$-value. Set the two expressions equal:
$$x+4=2x-5$$

steps.title: Solve for the coordinate
steps.content:
Solve for $x$:
$$4=x-5$$
$$9=x$$
The intersection point is $(a,b)$, so $a=9$. The answer is C.
